case_title: LAGUNA HONDA HOSPITAL & REHABILITATION CENTER vs. CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAGUNA HONDA HOSPITAL & REHABILITATION CENTER SERVED MAY-26-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAR-01-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 03
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY HERBERT, JOHN C
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAGUNA HONDA HOSPITAL & REHABILITATION CENTER
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL COURT TRIAL SET FOR FEB-27-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES 1. PLAINTIFF DID NOT VIOLATE SECTION 72523(A) OF TITLE 22 OF THE CALIFORNIA ADMINISTRATIVE CODE. ACCORDINGLY, THE ALLEGED VIOLATION OF SECTION 72523(A) IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE; 2. PLAINTIFF VIOLATED SECTION 72557(A) (22) OF TITLE 22 OF THE CALIFORNIA ADMINISTRATIVE CODE. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF'S VIOLATION OF SECTION 72557(A)(22) WAS NOT A CLASS "A" VIOLA- TION AND THEREFORE WAS NOT A CLASS "AA" VIOLATION; 3. PLAINTIFF'S VIOLATION OF SECTION 72557(A)(22) WAS A CLASS "B' VIOLATION, THEREFORE PURSUANT TO SECTION 1424(D) THE CALIFORNIA HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PAY A CIVIL PENALTY OF $1,000.00; AND 4. PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER COSTS OF SUIT AS PER
NO RESPONSE TO NOTICE; EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITIONS ORDERED DESTROYED

GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAGUNA HONDA HOSPITAL & REHABILITATION CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH SERVICES SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-19-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-19-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-30-1994
